declarations.default: css` .section { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 184px); } .selectionlist { flex: 35%; margin: 4px 4px 4px 8px; background-color: var(--mdc-theme-surface, white); overflow-y: scroll; } .elementeditorcontainer { flex: 65%; margin: 4px 8px 4px 4px; background-color: var(--mdc-theme-surface); overflow-y: scroll; display: flex; z-index: 0; } .listitem.header { font-weight: 500; } mwc-list-item.hidden[noninteractive] + li[divider] { display: none; } mwc-list-item.hidden[slot] + li[divider] { display: none; } .change.scl.element { display: none; } @media (max-width: 950px) { .elementeditorcontainer { display: block; } } @media (max-width: 599px) { .section { height: 100%; } .selectionlist { position: absolute; width: calc(100% - 32px); height: auto; top: 110px; left: 8px; z-index: 1; box-shadow: 0 8px 10px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14), 0 3px 14px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12), 0 5px 5px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .elementeditorcontainer { display: block; } data-set-element-editor { width: calc(100% - 16px); } .selectionlist.hidden { display: none; } .change.scl.element { display: flex; margin: 4px 8px 8px; } } `
